expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint distinguishes hyperlink styling, contextual navigation behavior, and fallback rendering safety
expectations.evidence: The output states the required case-focus items but explicitly says they cannot be confirmed due to missing Phase 5b checkpoint artifacts: “Case focus coverage (required by benchmark) — cannot be confirmed” and “Because Phase 5b checkpoint artifacts are missing, we cannot verify that: … 1) hyperlink styling distinction 2) contextual navigation behavior 3) fallback rendering safety.”

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The output is explicitly framed as Phase 5b checkpoint enforcement and references Phase 5b contract artifacts and validations: title “Phase 5b Checkpoint Enforcement (Advisory)”, section “What Phase 5b must produce (contract)”, and repeatedly notes missing “Phase 5b artifacts” (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, qa_plan_phase5b).
